params.label: Label set to measure
params.tip: Select which label set to measure. Reads {task_dir}/labels/{name}.zarr and writes {task_dir}/labelProps/{name}.h5ad.

params.label: Image for intensities
params.tip: Which image version to measure channel intensities from. Can differ from the image used for segmentation.

params.label: Intensity measure
params.tip: Statistic to use for per-channel intensity measurement.

params.label: Gaussian pre-smooth (σ)
params.tip: Gaussian blur sigma applied to the image before intensity measurement (0 = off).

params.label: Extended 3D measures
params.tip: Compute trimesh-based 3D shape descriptors (surface area, sphericity, compactness, ellipsoid axes). Slow but comprehensive for 3D images.
